_comment: S9 semantic_cluster receipt. Two things it records: the clustering QUALITY (ARI vs
ground-truth labels on the frozen testing/cluster/v1 corpus) and the fit THROUGHPUT
(a single-core measurement, from which the 100M projection follows).
Charter honesty: no performance claim without a committed reproducible benchmark, and a
roofline is labelled a roofline. The 100M-row < 10s single-node gate is NOT claimed at S9
(see scale_note) -- the same 'build the mechanism, measure honestly, do not claim the gate
you cannot meet on this rig' stance S7 took for the GPU.

ari._rule: ARI(clustering, ground-truth labels) on each frozen shape at the shipped params; the floor is 0.8 on every labeled shape, and noise is asserted low-confidence instead.

confidence_quality._rule: quality = 1 - inertia_k/inertia_1. The no-structure shape must fall below CLUSTER_CONFIDENCE_MIN (0.25) and every labeled shape above it.

novelty_benchmark._rule: Injected-novelty precision AND recall on the WORST seeded class (the S1 tail lesson), against a baseline built on normal traffic. Floors 0.9.
novelty_benchmark.note: Injected classes are the ones genuinely far from normal in this embedding space; a few synthetic token-namespaces collide into the baseline's hash buckets (a 64-dim hash-embedder artifact) and are not actually novel. Real embeddings (S13) do not have this pathology. Corpus-conditional.

throughput._rule: Single-core wall-clock for kmeans_minibatch at the shipped (restarts x epochs) quality params, on blobby dim-64 data. From bench_fit_throughput (cluster.rs), run --ignored.
throughput.machine: Apple Silicon aarch64, single core, debug-opt disabled note: measured in release

scale_note.why: The quality params (5 restarts x 15 epochs) that clear the ARI floor on the small corpus make the fit ~75 full passes; at ~1e4 rows/s single-core that is ~1e4 s for 100M, a ~1000x gap. The 100M target needs a SCALE profile the mechanism is built for but this sprint does not tune: single-restart + fewer-epoch fit, PQ-code ADC assignment (no exact-vector reconstruction), SIMD, and multi-core -- plus the streaming PQ-code fit that also removes the 512 MiB working-set bound. Filed, not faked.
scale_note.filed: scale profile + streaming PQ-code fit + distributed model-fit
